summary:
Methotrexate is the首选(first-line) treatment for rheumatoid arthritis, endorsed by major clinical guidelines such as ACR/EULAR, and proven effective in reducing symptoms and preventing joint damage. This consistent support across high-quality sources establishes its essential role in managing RA.  
\boxed{A}
